_comment: Trio trust-model config (single source of truth). Read by adjudicator/trio_adjudicate.py. A re-weight is a one-line edit here.
_domain_comment: DOMAIN-AWARE policy. The top-level weights/sensitive_min_weight stay the flat GENERAL default so every existing reader works unchanged. The domains{} map adds per-domain tables (weights + fleet ratio + per-engine role). Pick a domain by classifying the subject (CSS/HTML/templates/visual => ui; else general) or an explicit --domain ui. One-line-editable: each engine's weight/ratio/role is a single JSON line.

general._about: GENERAL/code domain. Codex = many-agent workhorse author (fast mode + priority tier); Gemini = READ-ONLY checkpoint auditor only; Opus = adjudicator/merger + author.

roles.codex: many-agent workhorse author (fast mode + priority tier)

ui._about: UI/design domain. Gemini = first-class design author AND reviewer (leveraged OVER Codex); Codex = code-correctness (markup/logic/a11y); Opus = adjudicator/merger.

roles.gemini: first-class design author AND reviewer (leveraged over Codex)
